name: What's my case worth if I can't breathe right from job chemicals in Boise?
description: $25K to over $1M depending on diagnosis, wages lost, and permanence; attorney estimates free.

mainEntity.name: What's my case worth if I can't breathe right from job chemicals in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: $25K to over $1M depending on diagnosis, wages lost, and permanence; attorney estimates free.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Settlements range $25K-$1M+ based on severity, lost wages, medical costs.** Silicosis or popcorn lung claims compensate pain, disability; Idaho follows similar comp schedules[4]. Key factors: Permanent impairment rating, future care needs, age; higher for wrongful death. Multi-party liability boosts value. Get independent medical exam, calculate economic losses accurately. Consult for free valuation using verdict data.
